events.event_description: U.S. diplomatic presence established in Macedonia with an Acting Principal Officer, indicating an initial liaison-level mission.

evidence.quote: Robert Norman, Acting Principal Officer. Credentials presented: 1993-12-03. Left post: 1996-06.

events.event_description: Mission elevated to embassy level with the arrival of a Chargé d'Affaires, indicating a full diplomatic mission was established.

evidence.quote: Victor D Comras, Chargé d'Affaires. Credentials presented: 1994-04. Left post: 1996-06-14.

events.event_description: First U.S. Ambassador to Macedonia (Christopher Robert Hill) presented credentials, confirming full embassy status.

evidence.quote: Christopher Robert Hill, Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary. Appointed: 1996-07-02. Credentials presented: 1996-07-29. Left post on 1999-08-02. Note: Commissioned to The Former Yugoslav Republic of Macedonia.
